debug_info.goal:
case mk.cons
a : Type
bs : List a
n : a
ns : List a
ok :
  ((n :: ns).isEmpty = true → bs.isEmpty = true ∨ bs.length = 1) ∧
    (bs.isEmpty = true → (n :: ns).isEmpty = true ∨ (n :: ns).length = 1)
⊢ failed to pretty print expression (use 'set_option pp.rawOnError true' for raw representation)

failed_attempts:
simp_all [SymList.mk, List.reverse_cons, List.reverse_nil, List.nil_append, List.cons_append]
      <;>
      (try cases bs <;> simp_all [SymList.mk, List.reverse_cons, List.reverse_nil, List.nil_append, List.cons_append])
      <;>
      (try contradiction)
      <;>
      (try aesop)

simp [SymList.init, SymList.reverse, SymList.tailSL, SymList.nil]
      <;>
      (try simp_all [SymList.init, SymList.reverse, SymList.tailSL, SymList.nil, List.cons_append, List.nil_append, List.append_assoc])
      <;>
      (try cases ns with
      | nil =>
        simp_all [SymList.init, SymList.reverse, SymList.tailSL, SymList.nil, List.cons_append, List.nil_append, List.append_assoc]
        <;>
        aesop
      | cons n' ns' =>
        simp_all [SymList.init, SymList.reverse, SymList.tailSL, SymList.nil, List.cons_append, List.nil_append, List.append_assoc]
        <;>
        aesop)
      <;>
      (try aesop)
      <;>
      (try simp_all [SymList.init, SymList.reverse, SymList.tailSL, SymList.nil, List.cons_append, List.nil_append, List.append_assoc])
      <;>
      (try aesop)

simp_all [SymList.init, SymList.reverse, SymList.tailSL, SymList.nil]
      <;> simp [List.tail, List.init, List.cons, List.nil]
      <;> aesop

simp_all [SymList.init, SymList.reverse, SymList.tailSL, SymList.nil, List.init]
      <;>
      (try cases bs <;> simp_all [SymList.init, SymList.reverse, SymList.tailSL, SymList.nil, List.init, List.foldr]) <;>
      (try simp_all [SymList.init, SymList.reverse, SymList.tailSL, SymList.nil, List.init, List.foldr]) <;>
      (try omega) <;>
      (try contradiction) <;>
      (try simp_all [List.cons_append, List.nil_append, List.append_cons]) <;>
      (try aesop)

simp_all [SymList.fromSL, SymList.init, SymList.reverse, SymList.tailSL]
      <;>
      (try cases ns <;> cases bs <;> simp_all [List.cons, List.nil, List.reverse_cons, List.reverse_nil, List.tail])
      <;>
      (try simp_all [List.cons, List.nil, List.reverse_cons, List.reverse_nil, List.tail])
      <;>
      (try aesop)
      <;>
      (try {
        simp_all [List.cons, List.nil, List.reverse_cons, List.reverse_nil, List.tail]

      <;>

        simp_all [List.cons, List.nil, List.reverse_cons, List.reverse_nil, List.tail]

        <;>

          <;>
          aesop

      <;>
      aesop

simp_all [SymList.init, SymList.reverse, SymList.tailSL, List.cons, List.nil]
      <;> aesop

simp_all [SymList.init, SymList.reverse, SymList.tailSL, List.append_assoc, List.append_comm, List.append_left_comm]
      <;>
        (try cases ns <;>
          cases bs <;>
          simp_all [List.append_assoc, List.append_comm, List.append_left_comm]) <;>
        (try simp_all [List.append_assoc, List.append_comm, List.append_left_comm]) <;>
        (try aesop) <;>

        (try aesop)

simp_all [SymList.init, SymList.reverse, SymList.tailSL, List.cons, List.nil, List.append]
      <;>
      (try cases bs <;> simp_all (config := {decide := true}))
      <;>
      (try aesop)

        cases ns with
